arts.ttl: Arsenal star dedicates Leicester win to wife after embarrassing Valentine's Day blunder
arts.sum: Arsenal felt the love against Leicester on Saturday as they beat the Foxes 2-0 but one Gunners star had some serious making up to after forgetting all about Valentine’s Day

arts.ttl: What Greg Taylor's Celtic contract talks have the dressing room saying ahead of Kieran Tierney return
arts.sum: Alistair Johnston is adamant his fellow full-back would be a huge loss if he leaves - but he sympathises with his situation

arts.ttl: Arsenal given answer on Diego Costa free agent signing as Gabriel Martinelli "victim" theory emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal should not be considering an audacious move for Diego Costa or another free agent to solve their attacking shortage, expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Man Utd get bombshell news as Arsenal and Chelsea start negotiations: FT recap
arts.sum: Man Utd get bombshell news as Arsenal and Chelsea start negotiations: FT recap Plus, Arsenal opened talks for a prolific striker and Chelsea were offered the chance for a spectacular swap deal.

arts.ttl: Merino's brace as Arsenal's No 9 cuts gap at the top to four points
arts.sum: Arsenal moved four points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool after Mikel Merino ’s late double saw off struggling Leicester City 2-0. Merino, who has started just eight Premier League matches this season, may now find himself in the starting XI more regularly as Arteta looks to deal with his injury crisis up front, with a London derby at Emirates Stadium against West Ham United up next for Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea handed major Musiala transfer update as new clause emerges
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala's new Bayern Munich contract has a reported release clause in it which will put the likes of Chelsea and Arsenal on high alert. The former Chelsea academy star has emerged as one of the brightest young talents in world football and has been repeatedly linked with a return to Stamford Bridge, despite his prominence in Bayern's starting XI.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sent frank warning over Arsenal future despite Leicester victory
arts.sum: Arsenal currently sit second in the Premier League, four points behind top of the table Liverpool, and Gunners boss Mikel Arteta has been told he must start winning silverware

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Merino dedicates brace to his wife as Gunners hero reveals Mikel Arteta message
arts.sum: Gunners hero forgot Valentine’s Day, but has quickly made amends to his wife

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy provides early James Justin injury update after Leicester City scare
arts.sum: Leicester City boss Ruud van Nistelrooy has confirmed that James Justin will be assessed on Sunday after being forced off in the first half against Arsenal on Saturday. After the loss, van Nistelrooy was asked about the immediate assessment of the defender's injury.

arts.ttl: Results will come for Leicester - Van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Leicester City boss Ruud van Nistelrooy believes his side will start to win matches if his side continue to perform like they did in the Foxes' 2-0 defeat at home to Arsenal.
